prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.5 kg; Height 177.1 cm; BMI 24.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.9%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 6.8%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 141mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 177mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.7kg; 9 months ago 79.2kg; 6 months ago 78.1kg; 3 months ago 76.3kg; current 77.5kg), Height (12 months ago 177.1cm; 9 months ago 177.1cm; 6 months ago 177.1cm; 3 months ago 177.1cm; current 177.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 140mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 73U/L; 9 months ago 64U/L; 6 months ago 64U/L; 3 months ago 73U/L; current 66U/L), AST (12 months ago 49U/L; 9 months ago 42U/L; 6 months ago 50U/L; 3 months ago 42U/L; current 44U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 812mg/g; 9 months ago 784mg/g; 6 months ago 798mg/g; 3 months ago 1062mg/g; current 945mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 133mg/dL; 9 months ago 119mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 118mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
